tier_validation.discrepancy_resolution: Tier ordinal encoding: assertion=3, presupposition=2, implicature=1. Correctness = 1 if pragma_problog prediction matches ground truth label, else 0. Negative correlation expected if higher tiers → higher correctness (i.e., assertion facts more reliable). Positive ρ here means higher tier = higher correctness.

notes: HB = fraction of proof from presupposition+implicature facts
Negative r expected: higher HB → more uncertain → lower correctness
